seo.title: Perfect boiled eggs - yes it's possible - Marinda Kook

html:
It took a stage play (Voorskoot en Lipstiek) to teach me how to make the perfect boiled egg. Marion Holm wrote it into the script. She learned it from Elzabe Zietsman. Well, I tried it and yes, it works!

 

  1. put the eggs in a pot with cold water
  2. put the lid on and wait for the water to start boiling
  3. once the water is boiling, switch off the stove and leave the pot on the hot plate for exactly 5 minutes
  4. take the eggs off the plate and rinse them under cold running water – this stops the cooking process
  5. and yes, you've got the perfect boiled egg

A household can go far with a boiled egg.
